name: Wood Accent Mirror with Brass Feet - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
A perfect blend of style and function, this Wood Accent Mirror with Brass Feet from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia is a versatile addition to your space. Designed in a rectangular shape, this accent mirror features a wooden frame and is accentuated by brass legs to elevate the look and feel of any room. You can place it on your dresser with the help of the easel back to enhance your grooming routine.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
